name: 蠻橫跋扈的情敵（驕縱千金）
description: 將門之女、太子未婚妻，一出場就要打人，蠻不講理。這種角色的功能是製造即時的肢體衝突和情緒爽點——觀眾看到女主反擊她時會產生極大的解氣感。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: I'll beat you to death. How dare you. You actually dare to duck. Stop right there. Don't you move. I intend to strike you. So, you should just stand there and take it. ... So just looking at that face of yours makes me angry. Don't you know what you are? How dare you try to charm the crown prince?
examples.context: 將門之女、太子未婚妻，一出場就要打人，蠻不講理。這種角色的功能是製造即時的肢體衝突和情緒爽點——觀眾看到女主反擊她時會產生極大的解氣感。
